routes.name: task_tdd_green_to_next_task
routes.trigger: Jack completes current task and task-level TDD/checks pass
routes.hard_rule: No task green, no next task.

routes.name: pr_green_and_approved_to_merge
routes.trigger: Feature/ticket complete, GitHub PR checks green, required approval received
routes.hard_rule: No PR green and approval, no merge.
